title: Export Dashbaord to PDF and retain Hyperlinks?
excerpt:
I am SO thankful that we export Dashboards to PDF now, however I cannot seem to be able to export the dashboard AND keep the URL Hyperlinks that I have within Text Widgets to be active (clickable) in the PDF. 
Is this po…

posts.author: KWagar (Keith Wagar)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am SO thankful that we export Dashboards to PDF now, however I cannot seem to be able to export the dashboard AND keep the URL Hyperlinks that I have within Text Widgets to be active (clickable) in the PDF.

Is this possible?

posts.author: JenefaJ (Jenefa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, this is possible with The PDF Maker (app.thepdfmaker.com).

You can generate PDFs from dashboards or any integrated data source while preserving active hyperlinks. If your text widgets or data fields include clickable links, The PDF Maker allows you to retain those in the exported PDF—making your documents interactive and user-friendly even outside Monday.

Every new response triggers the PDF generation automatically.

Please view the support article below:

help.thepdfmaker.com

Automate Documents with the Monday App - Full Guide | The PDF Maker Help Center

Master document automation using the Monday app and PDF Maker. Streamline workflows and enhance productivity by effortlessly generating PDFs directly from Monday.com.

posts.author: Flowtech (Flowtech Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KWagar
You can achieve this and create customized documents (like PDFs, invoices, quotes, reports, or contracts) directly from your monday.com data, you might want to check out DocCreate.

With DocCreate, you can:

Automatically generate a PDF from board data — including from a Workdoc-style layout

Attach the generated PDF to a File column — no need to download or re-upload manually

Email the PDF to external clients instantly using pre-configured templates

Fully customize the layout with logos, headers, footers, and page breaks

Embed images, data from connected boards, and subitems into your PDFs seamlessly
